text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is here. While other students are
training hard to achieve their next goal, Mejiro
Ryan reveals that she has to skip the autumn
Tenno Sho to recover from her injury.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ryan will instead spend her time at camp helping
Mejiro McQueen train, so that she can carry on
her hopes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Ines Fujin reaffirms her own
motivation. She knows that plenty of people are
pinning their hopes on her, too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If Ines is going to learn to love running even more
than she already does, we'd better make this a
fruitful camp experience!
